_schema: Generation History — localStorage key: aics_pb_history. Metadata array capped at 30 entries; local image Blobs are stored separately in IndexedDB aics_image_store/images.
_migration: loadHistory() runs migrateHistory() on read. v4 adds image_id: missing/invalid values become empty strings. Existing v3 image_url values remain normalized http/https URLs and are not downloaded or converted to Blobs. Older seed, rating, lora, negative, favorite and notes fields keep existing migration rules.
_image_storage: Local PNG/JPG/WebP files are stored as Blob records in IndexedDB aics_image_store, object store images. localStorage never stores Blob, Base64 or data URLs. Display priority: image_id Blob, then image_url, then the movie fallback. Deleting history and evicting entries beyond 30 also deletes unreferenced image_id records.

_fields.id: number — unique per-entry id (Date.now()); used for regen/variant links
_fields.timestamp: number — ms epoch; fallback to id when missing
_fields.sceneTitle: string|null — denormalized scene title for display
_fields.lora: string — lora spec inserted (e.g. ayachi_nene_v11:0.8); default-derived when missing
_fields.image_id: string — optional IndexedDB images store key for a locally imported image; empty when absent
_fields.image_url: string — optional normalized http/https external image URL; retained as compatibility fallback
_fields.version: integer — scene+character version chain; parent_id links prior
_fields.parent_id: number|null — prior version id for same scene+character
